retry_reason: The put operation always succeeds; there is no failure path. If the refcount hits zero, the object will be garbage collected; retrying is not applicable.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the refcount of an mlx5_vdpa_mr object. If the refcount reaches zero, the object is moved to a garbage collection list and delayed work is scheduled to perform cleanup. The caller must not use the mr after this call unless they hold another reference. This function is the release side of the reference-count lifecycle and should be called when the caller is done with its reference.
